sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110210" key="fallhfo/ria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φαλληφόρ-ια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n110210.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">festival</tr_> of Dionysus <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in which a phallus was carried in procession,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">355e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
